title: Quality Profile Groups Schema
description: Schema for grouping quality profiles into logical categories. Order of groups determines display order.

name.description: Display name for the profile group

profiles.description: Map of quality profile slugs to their trash_id hashes

profile_overrides.description: Optional per-profile overrides consumed by the render_profile_cfs macro in main.py. Keyed by the same slug as `profiles`. Each entry pins the macro's behaviour without editing the cf-groups JSON.

profile_name.description: Exact `name` field of the quality profile this override applies to (matches the keys used in cf-groups quality_profiles.include).

exclude_groups.description: cf-group filename slugs the macro must skip even if their quality_profiles.include lists this profile.

add_groups.description: cf-group filename slugs to force-attach to this profile when the cf-group's own quality_profiles.include omits it (common for groups still mapped only to Base Profile).

force_required.description: cf-group filename slugs to render under the 'required' header regardless of their top-level `default` flag.

force_optional.description: cf-group filename slugs to render under the 'optional' header regardless of their top-level `default` flag.

include_cfs.description: Per-cf-group whitelist. Keys are cf-group filename slugs; values are arrays of CF filename slugs to include from that group (all other CFs in the group are dropped). Useful for profile-specific tier subsets of `release-groups-hq`.

exclude_cfs.description: Per-cf-group blacklist. Keys are cf-group filename slugs; values are arrays of CF filename slugs to drop from that group.
